posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
NO CODE AUTOMATION TRAINING FOR MONDAY-MAKE USERS
Masterclass - Handle Array & Collections like a Pro (on Make.Com)
Most Make users struggle to work with complex Arrays, Collections, and arrays inside an array.

We decoded three powerful methods that can help you overcome almost all challenges working with arrays & collections.

To share this knowledge with you all, we decided to conduct a live workshop, where you will learn;

1. How to get an item from an array in three methods
2. How to extract an item from a dynamic collection
3. How to Combine the Typeform and Calendly Question & Answers in just two operations

To ensure the quality of learning we opened only 20 seats in this workshop. Don’t miss out, reserve your seat today.

The workshop is scheduled for Friday 8th July 2022 at 11:30 a.m. - 01:00 p.m. EST (Eastern Standard Time)

Grab your seat now @ https://www.msquare.pro/product-page/masterclass-handle-array-collections-like-a-pro-on-make-com

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml: Also recording is provided for the registrants along with the practice material.
